prompt: Create a high-contrast, cinematic graphic design poster inspired by the TV series Breaking Bad. Use a 2x6 vertical grid to display 12 iconic character cards. Blend urban graffiti with crime thriller aesthetics, using worn textures, film grain, and bold sans-serif font mask effects. Each card highlights names like 'Walter' in large font, with the portrait visible only within the text fill (clipping mask effect). Beneath the name, place concise movie subtitles like 'Mafia Boss'. Characters use realistic, gritty portraits with cold expressions. Apply high-contrast dramatic lighting, rim light, and shadows. Overlay ink splashes, paint drips, brush strokes, and scratches. The palette uses dark green, toxic neon green, grayscale, charcoal, dirty yellow, and off-white.
